original: A too-small white T-shirt, with sleeves that reach halfway to her elbows; a hem that reaches just beneath the ribs, exposing midriff. It would to any breasts, leaving nothing to the imagination. Emblazoned on its front is a cutesy cartoon character – what looks like a pink cat-like creature with huge blue eyes, striking a playful pose, standing on top of some words written in a language you don’t immediately understand. For pants, it comes with a pair of cut-off jeans that hug tightly to the thighs; they also only reach halfway to the knees, exposing quite a lot of leg.
